gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest community apps and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file, refreshing the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date community highlights and project news.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a news courier, updating a community bulletin board with fresh papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh paper bulletin to a wooden board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning a fresh paper bulletin to a wooden board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background.
